settings.text: Limited Availability: Currently accepting 4 Bespoke Commissions for Q3 2026

settings.quote: A Nancy Vuu gown is a breathtaking embodiment of a sacred covenant—a physical testament to a lasting legacy. Our master artisans celebrate your original design, sculpting and draping with a precision that weaves together your strength, grace, and inner beauty.

settings.heading: Sanctuary Arrival
settings.description: Step into a private sanctuary where the world falls away, beginning with a ceremonial tea and vision alignment.

settings.heading: Architectural Sketching
settings.description: Nancy captures the geometry of your spirit on paper, creating an original blueprint exclusive to your legacy.

settings.heading: The Crowning Fitting
settings.description: A final coronation in our San Jose atelier, where master tailors ensure the gown becomes a second skin.
Immersion in the slow-craft artisan journey.
Mastery Sprints for urgent mandates. (Availability Limited)

settings.heading: Architect of Vision
settings.description: We capture your dream through precise sketches and initial measurements in our private sanctuary.

settings.heading: The Master Build
settings.description: Your design is sent to our Vietnam Atelier where master artisans hand-build your legacy over hundreds of hours.

settings.heading: The Final Coronation
settings.description: The dress returns for final fittings and refinements by our San Jose master tailors.

settings.text: My journey began as a refugee, leaving the shores of Vietnam with nothing but a dream. Today, I return not as a stranger, but as a restorer.

The House of VUU is the bridge between my birthland's artisanal soul and your divine design. By hand-crafting our gowns in our Vietnam Atelier, we aren't just making a dress; we are empowering a community and honoring a lineage.
"From the first sketch in San Jose to the final stitch in the homeland, your gown is a physical anthem of a dream realized."

settings.title: Your Pathway to Sovereignty
settings.subtitle: Defining the architectural depth of your commission
settings.footnote: *The Artisan Toile is a dedicated mock-up fitting exclusive to Bespoke commissions.

settings.title: The Private Registry
settings.success_message: The Atelier will contact you shortly regarding your covenant date.
